# Ham Documentation — Full Page Listing

> Ham is a campus life assistant app for Wuhan University (WHU), providing course schedules, GPA calculation, library reservations, sports venue booking, campus bus tracking, and more.

## User Handbook

- [Introduction](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/): Overview of Ham features and getting started
- [Status](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/status): Service status and announcements
- [Courses](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/course): Import and view course schedules
- [Library](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/library): Library seat reservation and auto-booking
- [Scores](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/score): GPA calculation, credit statistics, and grade distribution
- [Sports Venues](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/sport): Sports venue booking and auto-reservation
- [E-Card](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/pay): Quick access to campus payment QR code
- [Schedule](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/schedule): Assignment tracking with due-date reminders and iOS calendar sync
- [Campus Bus](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/bus): Real-time campus bus arrival information
- [Automation](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/automatic): Automated tasks (library auto-booking, sports auto-reservation)
- [User Center](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/user-center): Account management and settings
- [Feedback](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/bugfix): Bug reports and feature requests

## Developers

- [Developer Overview](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/): Introduction to Ham's developer ecosystem

### Ham Connect (Open Platform)

- [Overview](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/open-platform/): Ham Connect SSO platform overview and capabilities
- [OAuth2 Integration Guide](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/open-platform/oauth2-guide): Step-by-step guide to integrate Ham SSO via OAuth2
- [Login Button Source Code](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/open-platform/login-button): Multi-platform "Login with Ham" button components (Vue, React, React Native, Android, iOS, HTML/CSS)
- [Brand Assets](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/open-platform/brand-assets): Official Ham icons, brand colors, and usage guidelines

### Ham Web

- [Overview](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-web/): Ham Web frontend architecture and features
- [SSO OAuth2 Authorization](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-web/sso-authorize): SSO authorization flow and API reference

### Ham React Native Components

- [Overview](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-rn/): React Native component library for Ham features
- [CAS Authentication](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-rn/cas): CAS login module for WHU authentication
- [Education Module](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-rn/education): Course and academic data APIs
- [Score Calculation](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-rn/score-calc): GPA and credit calculation utilities

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/privacy/): Data collection, storage, and usage policies
- [User Agreement](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/privacy/user-policy): Terms of service

## Other

- [About](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/about/): About Ham, safety, and open-source status
- [Download](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/download/): App download links for iOS and Android
